name: CRESCENT BIOPHARMA, INC.
summary: Part I Corporate Information We were incorporated under the laws of the State of Delaware in 2003. Our company, formerly known as GlycoMimetics, Inc., is a biotechnology company that is the result of a reverse recapitalization transaction with a private company named Crescent Biopharma, Inc. (Pre-Merger Crescent). Prior to the reverse recapitalization transaction, Pre-Merger Crescent was established and incorporated under the laws of the state of Delaware on September 19, 2024.
